title: Chancellor Search and Screen Committee named
summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, President of the Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents, and Chris Patton, Executive-in-Charge of the Universities of Wisconsin, have appointed a 23-member Search and Screen Committee to help identify the next UW–Madison chancellor.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学任命麦迪逊分校校长遴选审查委员会

title: 2026 Chancellor’s Undergraduate Awards Ceremony recognizes 179 outstanding students
summary_en: Provost John Zumbrunnen praised the winners for expanding what we know and understand about our world.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校举办2026年度校长本科生颁奖典礼表彰179名优秀学生
